seo.title: 22 Minute Hard Corps Program Overview: Start Your Journey Here
seo.description: Get in shape and lose weight really simply with 22 Minute hard Corps. See what the program includes, any equipment needed and meet your trainer here.

trainers.bioBodi: Tony has revolutionized the fitness world by helping millions of people get ripped and get healthy with his total-body workouts. He’s collaborated with BODi on some of our biggest programs, pushing people all over the world to work towards their own extreme body transformations.

data.descriptionShort: You can get boot camp fit, and see outstanding results in just 22 minutes a day.
data.descriptionLong: With 22 Minute Hard Corps basic-training program, Tony Horton makes getting in shape and losing weight really simple. Fall-in for just 22 minutes a day and you’ll see outstanding results.

equipmentRequired.title: Chin-Up Bar or Bands with Door Attachment

modules.equipment: Dumbbells, Chin-Up Bar or Bands with Door Attachment, Sandbag*, Chin-Up Max*, Mat*
modules.categories: Cardio, Strength, Bodyweight Training, Bootcamp, Weight Loss, Core

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

modules.title: Juliez F. lost 12 pounds doing 22 Minute Hard Corps!
modules.testimonial: Tony knows what works and got the job done in only 22 minutes. That is Hard Corps – Get Some!
modules.disclaimer: Results vary based on starting point and effort.
